title: Bug fixes: order lifecycle + options exit + alpha validation investigation

strategic_gate_check.ic_computing_real_values: CLEARED — reversion=+0.12, breakout=+0.08, momentum=+0.06 leading. HHI cap applied.
strategic_gate_check.win_rate_trend_understood: IN PROGRESS — score=0 anomaly explained (IBKR historical imports). Gate kept until 40+ signal-driven closed trades available for IC correlation.

deliverables.detail: test_positive_correlation_detected and test_negative_correlation_detected failed because 30 records used a single symbol on a single date. The cross-sectional IC methodology requires ≥10 symbols per trading date. Fixed: 30 distinct symbols, min_valid=1. 1,617 tests passing.

Portfolio manager EXIT for options positions (GSAT, LUNR) was silently returning False. execute_sell() did a direct active_trades[symbol] lookup but options are stored under composite keys like 'GSAT_C_35.0_2026-04-17'. Fixed: search by symbol field when direct key misses; reconstruct option contract from stored expiry/strike/right.

No EXITING state existed. PM was issuing EXIT 11+ times for the same symbol (ONDS) while the signal pipeline immediately re-entered. Added: EXITING status to active_trades (set atomically before order placement, reset on failed option sells), recently_closed TTL dict, reentry_cooldown_minutes=30 config, early-exit gates in execute_buy(), execute_sell(), execute_sell_option(), signal_dispatcher, and bot_trading PM handler.

Score=0 anomaly: 87/108 closed trades are IBKR historical imports (activity statements March 23-25) with no signal pipeline involvement — not a bug. Win rate 33.3% is mechanically explained by 2:1 SL:TP ratio. Gate kept — insufficient signal-driven closed trades (~13) for IC correlation.

system_state.open_options_bleeding: GSAT (-42% from entry, stop at -50%), LUNR (-22% from entry, stop at -50%) — stops not yet hit, holding correctly per config

bugs_found_not_fixed: execute_sell_option() returns False outside options market hours — PM EXIT calls at non-market hours are silently discarded. To investigate.
Stop orders on GSAT/LUNR may have been cancelled by close_position() called from dashboard — no mechanism to re-submit orphaned stops.
gate_decision: KEEP — alpha validation gate remains. No new features. Bug fixes allowed. Next check when signal-driven closed trades reach 40.
